description_long: This is a compact, tracked combat vehicle with a boxy, angular hull and a rotating turret mounted on top. The turret features a prominent cannon barrel and a small hatch, with riveted details and a camouflage paint scheme in green, beige, and dark green. The vehicle's body is covered in sloped armor plating, with visible bolts and seams, and the tracks are wide with multiple road wheels for stability. The front and sides of the hull are reinforced, and the rear has a slightly raised engine compartment. The vehicle's design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th-century light tanks, optimized for maneuverability in urban or rugged environments. No visible military insignia or unit markings are present, and the camouflage pattern is irregular and organic.
description: A small, tracked combat vehicle with a rotating turret, sloped armor, and a green-beige camouflage pattern.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main cannon, sloped armor, and left track assembly.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the engine compartment and left track, with turret facing forward.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the right track, rear armor, and turret details.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the cannon, right track, and front armor features.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible cannon mounted on the front of the turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped steel armor plating, moderate thickness, visible rivets and seams.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland-style camouflage with irregular green, beige, and dark green patches.
